title: BaseConnect onboarding storyboard health — staging backend
description: Cold-start top-level health profile for the full DEV Storyboard + BaseConnect onboarding path: bc-storyboard source, manager dashboard remote-storyboard route, and BaseConnect frontend staging backend runtime.

checks.repairHint: Repair the failing child owner shown in the tree: bc-frontend should start the staging web app runtime with the staging backend API and publish its current URL; bc-storyboard should restore the storyboard source/check-all endpoint; manager-dashboard should serve the Health Dashboard and Storyboard editor routes; ddev-storyboard is not required for this check to pass. Current resolved URLs belong in row details/evidence only; no fake repair action is exposed here.
